refs.description: Dedicated tortoise-and-hare implementation over a linked list, with detect_cycle advancing slow_pointer one node and fast_pointer two nodes until they meet.
A full singly linked list data structure whose detectLoop() method embeds Floyd's algorithm using currentNodeSlow and currentNodeFast pointers to detect a loop.
Reference Java implementation of Floyd's tortoise-and-hare loop detection on a singly linked list.
